product: AI/BI dashboard global filters panel improvements
tagline: Global filters panel expanded by default: The global filters panel now opens by default when users first visit a dashboard to improve discoverability.
what_it_does: Global filters panel expanded by default: The global filters panel now opens by default when users first visit a dashboard to improve discoverability. On subsequent visits, the panel preserves the user's last setting.
why_it_matters: Global filters panel expanded by default: The global filters panel now opens by default when users first visit a dashboard to improve discoverability.
plain_summary: Global filters panel expanded by default: The global filters panel now opens by default when users first visit a dashboard to improve discoverability. On subsequent visits, the panel preserves the user's last setting.
